$comment: Files under `files` are exempt from the claude-md-length warning up to their recorded word count (plus a 10% growth buffer). Each colocated CLAUDE.md is auto-injected into agent context, so the budget is ~600 words; move deeper detail into a linked doc under docs/. The check shrink-wraps stale entries on local runs: dead entries and files back under the threshold are removed, and entries with more than 10% slack are ratcheted down to the file's current count.
